title: clinopodium mexicanum
intro: Clinopodium mexicanum, also known as Mexican clinopodium or Mexican wild bergamot, is a type of perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Clinopodium mexicanum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
